## TextColour type

All the available text colours in OpenRCT2.

**Signature:**

```typescript
type TextColour = "black" | "grey" | "white" | "red" | "green" | "yellow" | "topaz" | "celadon" | "babyblue" | "palelavender" | "palegold" | "lightpink" | "pearlaqua" | "palesilver";
```
